sections.paragraph:
Original: רקם

Transliteration: râqam

Phonetic: raw-kam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to variegate, mix colours
    1. (Qal) variegator (worker in colours) (participle)
    2. (Pual) to be skilfully wrought or woven

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2216

Part(s) of speech: Verb
